stories: Good evening Sean, it's Monday evening, the eleventh of May, 2026
Fun fact: in Germany and central Europe, May eleventh through thirteenth are known as the Eisheiligen - the Ice Saints
German gardeners still wait until after the fifteenth before planting frost-sensitive crops outside
It starts early - the T400 Briefing on FY2027 Annual Improvement Priorities is at seven in the morning
From nine you're into ERP Strategic Roadmap sessions, with the Meridian Risk Workshop at nine-thirty
The anchor meeting is L4 EAS MOP and MIP from ten until eleven-thirty, followed by weekly integrations with PwC
The afternoon has L5 prep from two, the Growth AIP feedback session at three, and the Zain revision closing things out at four
On tourism, the STB released its 2026 outlook: arrivals are forecast at seventeen to eighteen million, though spending per visitor is expected to soften as global uncertainty bites
Good morning Sean, it's Monday, the eleventh of May, 2026
Fun fact: twenty-nine years ago today, IBM's Deep Blue defeated chess world champion Garry Kasparov ГўВЂВ” the first computer ever to beat a reigning world champion in a full match
The Mount Dukono story has moved from a search to a recovery
Rescue teams have located the bodies of the two missing Singaporean hikers near the crater rim, but continuous eruptions, flooding, and rain have halted retrieval operations
Both are confirmed dead, alongside a local guide
The seven surviving Singaporeans are heading home ГўВЂВ” a tragic end to a group that entered a restricted zone to create social media content
On a brighter note, Singapore's CPF could soon become a major driver of local equities
A new proposal would redirect fund savings into the stock market, with Citi estimating annual inflows of six to nine billion dollars

Good evening Sean, it's Sunday evening, the tenth of May 2026
Hope you connected with family today ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” it was Mother's Day
Fun fact: scientists this week identified regeneration genes shared across axolotls, zebrafish, and mice that could one day help humans regrow lost limbs
At ten, your Weekly Planning and Look-Ahead with Bob and Rehan on WebEx
At eleven thirty, your Monthly one-on-one with Robyn
The Mount Dukono search has entered a grim phase ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” teams have narrowed focus to two volcanic sand mounds near the crater, the suspected sites of the two missing Singaporeans
A hundred and fifty personnel are pressing on despite continuous eruptions and rain
The seven other Singaporeans evacuated from the volcano were due home today
